nasb.text: Then God blessed the seventh day and sanctified it, because in it He rested from all His work which God had created and made.

esv.text: So God blessed the seventh day and made it holy, because on it God rested from all his work that he had done in creation.

cnv.text: 神賜福第七日，把它分別為聖，因為在這一日，　神停了他一切所創造的工，歇息了。

ccb.text: 上帝赐福给第七天，将其定为圣日，因为祂在这一天歇了祂一切的创造之工。

csbs.text: 神就祝福第七日，把它分别为圣，因为在这日，神安息了，歇了他所做的一切创造之工。
